notes: Copy this to .update-state.json. lastCheckedAt throttles the daily background update check (>24h). cachedDriveModifiedTime is the Drive modifiedTime captured the last time matchups.json was rebuilt via scripts/build_matchups.py. lastKnownPatch is the latest game patch recorded in azir-patches.md; the background check compares it to the wiki Patch History and reports newer patches / changed interactions.
